title: LC-MS Sample Prep: Standards/Calibration Curves/Patient Samples
author: Opentrons

steps.title: Prepare Standard Samples for Calibration Curves
steps.instruction: Prepare Standard Samples for Calibration Curves. Prepare Pooled and or Patient Samples. With this protocol, your robot can perform sample preparation for LC-MS as described [experimental protocol](https://s3.amazonaws.com/pf-upload-01/u-4256/0/2021-05-12/eq03qff/Protocol-90%20ul-tube.pdf) This step prepares standards for calibration curves followed by patient samples.

steps.title: Make a 1:2 dilution series of unlabeled standards
steps.instruction: Make a 1:2 dilution series of unlabeled standards.

steps.title: Prepare a solution of labeled standards
steps.instruction: Prepare a solution of labeled standards.

steps.title: Distribute Golden Plasma to sample tubes
steps.instruction: Distribute Golden Plasma to sample tubes.

steps.title: Combine unlabelled standard, NEM, labeled standard
steps.instruction: Combine unlabelled standard, NEM, labeled standard.
